title: GraphQL Request
description: Schema describing the structure of a GraphQL request as defined by the GraphQL over HTTP specification. A GraphQL request contains a query string, optional variables, and an optional operation name.

query.description: A string containing the GraphQL document (query, mutation, or subscription) to be executed.

operationName.description: The name of the operation to execute, required when the document contains multiple operations.

variables.description: A map of variable names to their values, used to parameterize the GraphQL operation.

extensions.description: A map reserved for implementors to extend the protocol with additional data.
